# Hybrid Templates Index

## Purpose
Provide a registry of hybrid artefact templates used by governance and iterative delivery.

## Categories
- Plans (`plans/`)
- Reports (`reports/`)
- Risk (`risk/`)
- Finance (`finance/`)
- Resources (`resources/`)
- Governance (`governance/`)

## Templates
| Artefact | Purpose | Used by (agent) | File |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Hybrid charter | Define objectives, governance, and cadence. | Agent 08 (Project Definition) | `governance/hybrid-charter.md` |
| Governance charter | Define governance structure, decision rights, and gates. | Agent 03 (Approval Workflow) | `governance/governance-pack.md` |
| Milestone plan | Track stage gates and iterations. | Agent 10 (Schedule & Planning) | `plans/milestone-plan.xlsx` |
| Integrated risk register | Track risks across sequential and iterative delivery. | Agent 15 (Risk Management) | `risk/integrated-risk-register.xlsx` |
| Integrated risk register (hybrid view) | Track sprint and phase risks together. | Agent 15 (Risk Management) | `risk/integrated-risk-register.md` |
| Hybrid resource plan | Align phase and sprint resources. | Agent 11 (Resource & Capacity) | `resources/hybrid-resource-plan.md` |
| Hybrid team management | Define team structures, roles, and integration practices. | Agent 11 (Resource & Capacity) | `resources/hybrid-team-management.md` |
| Decision log | Track cross-phase decisions. | Agent 09 (Lifecycle & Governance) | `governance/decision-log.md` |
| Roles & responsibilities matrix | Define hybrid roles and shared responsibilities. | Agent 09 (Lifecycle & Governance) | `resources/roles-responsibilities.md` |

## Related References
- Hybrid methodology map (`docs/methodology/hybrid/map.yaml`).
- Hybrid gates (`docs/methodology/hybrid/gates.yaml`).
